title: leucanthemum ceratophylloides var. barrelieri
intro: Leucanthemum ceratophylloides var. barrelieri, also known as the Barrelier's daisy, is a plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its yellow flowers and upright growth habit. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Leucanthemum ceratophylloides var. barrelieri include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to exhibit antioxidant and antifungal properties. Leucanthemum ceratophylloides var. barrelieri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
